onChange.script:
"""
			Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
			Written Date: 04/09/2024
			Purpose: Check Special character in text. 
	"""
	import re
	 
	def contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    # Define a regex pattern for special characters
	    pattern = r'[^a-zA-Z0-9]'
	    
	    # Search for special characters
	    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
	        return True
	    else:
	        return False
	input_string = self.props.text
	if contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]

		input_string = self.props.text
		if contains_special_characters(input_string):

"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: email should be less than 100.
	"""
	import re
	text = self.props.text
	if len(text) <= 100:
		self.props.text = self.props.text

			 
		def contains_special_characters(input_string):
		    # Define a regex pattern for special characters
		    pattern = r'[^a-zA-Z0-9@.]'
		    
		    # Search for special characters
		    if re.search(pattern, input_string):

		    else:
		        return False
		input_string = self.props.text

		    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]
	else:
		self.props.text = ''

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: reset all values.
	"""
	# Write your script here
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")

import re
	try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose:Save Add/Edit Events to Table
			
			update date:10/01/2025
			author: Aniket Sagar
			purpose: Send mail for new user creation except operator and wm role
		"""
		firstName = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntFirstName").getChild("txt").props.text
		lastName = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLastName").getChild("txt").props.text
		userName = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntUserName").getChild("txt").props.text 
		roleID = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntRoles").getChild("drpRole").props.value
		email = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntEMail").getChild("txt").props.text
		countrycode = str(self.parent.parent.getChild("cntPhone").getChild("txtCountryCode").props.text)
		number = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntPhone").getChild("txt").props.text
		serviceRequest=self.parent.parent.getChild("SR").getChild("txt").props.text
#		phoneNumber = countrycode + " " + number
		password = "None"
#		password = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntPassword").getChild("txt").props.text
		if str(self.parent.parent.getChild("cntExpiry").getChild("drpExpiry").props.value) == "NEVER":
			passwordExpiry =  str(self.parent.parent.getChild("cntExpiryDate").getChild("ToDateTimeInput").props.value)
		else:
			passwordExpiry = str(self.parent.parent.getChild("cntExpiryDate").getChild("ToDateTimeInput").props.value)
		isActive = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value
		try:
			#checking format for email and valid phone number
			if len(number) == 10 and int(number):
				next = 1
				pattern =r'^\+\d+$'
				if len(countrycode) <= 3 and re.search(pattern,str(countrycode)):
					next = 1
					pattern = r'^[a-zA-Z0-9._%+-]+@[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+$'
					if re.search(pattern,str(email)):
					    next = 1
					else:
					    next = 0
					    message = "Please Enter a Valid Email!"
	    				state = "warning"
				else:
					next = 0
					message = "Please Enter a Valid Country code!"
					state = "warning"
			else:
				system.perspective.print("in else 36")
				next = 0
				message = "Please Enter a Valid Phone Number!"
				state = "warning"
		except:
			next = 0
			message = "Please Enter a Valid Phone Number!"
			state = "warning"
		#Active Direcory Check USer Is exists or Not Added by sagar	
		IsExits=0	
		if next == 1:	
			username=userName.strip()
			user_details =Project_VECV.ActiveDirectory.ActiveDirectoryUsers.getUserDetails(username)
			IsExits=0
			
			if isinstance(user_details, dict):
#			    print("User Details for {}: {}".format(username, user_details))
			    IsExits=1
			else:
				username=username.lower()
				user_details =Project_VECV.ActiveDirectory.ActiveDirectoryUsers.getUserDetails(username)
				if isinstance(user_details, dict):
					IsExits=1
				else:
					username=username.upper()
					user_details =Project_VECV.ActiveDirectory.ActiveDirectoryUsers.getUserDetails(username)
					if isinstance(user_details, dict):
						IsExits=1	
			if IsExits<>1:
				message = "Please Add Username in Active Direcory!"
				state = "warning"
		#ENd Active Direcory Check USer Is exists or Not Added by sagar											
		if next == 1 and IsExits==1:
			phoneNumber = countrycode + " " + str(number)
			if self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text == 'Add':
				createdBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
				Id = 0
				result = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.User.InsertUpdateUser.UpdateUserManagement(firstName, lastName, userName, roleID, email, phoneNumber, isActive, password, passwordExpiry, createdBy, Id, serviceRequest)
				if(result==0):
					message = str(userName) + " Already Exists!"
					state = "warning"
				elif(result==1):
					self.props.enabled=0
					message = str(userName) +" details added successfully."
					state = "success"
					auditMsg=str(userName) +" User details added successfully"
					if (roleID!=2 or roleID!=66):
						try:
							Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.User.sendEmailforNewUser.sendMail(firstName,lastName,email,serviceRequest,userName,passwordExpiry,createdBy)
							system.perspective.print("Email sent---->")
						except:
							system.perspective.print("Email not sent---->")
							pass
			else:
				modifiedBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
#				modifiedDate= system.date.now()
				Id = self.session.custom.selectedUserId
				result = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.User.InsertUpdateUser.UpdateUserManagement(firstName, lastName, userName, roleID, email, phoneNumber, isActive, password, passwordExpiry, modifiedBy, Id, serviceRequest)
				if(result==0):
					message = str(userName) +" Already Exists!"
					state = "warning"
				elif(result==1):
					self.props.enabled=0
					message = str(userName) +" details updated successfully."
					state = "success"
					auditMsg=str(userName) +" User details updated successfully."
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
			system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
			system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
		else:
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
		
		#addToAuditLogStrat
		system.perspective.print(auditMsg)
		category='Adminstration'
		subCategory='User Management'
		if(Id!=0):
			prevDesc=self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload
			#curDesc={"linetypecode":LineTypeCode, "mode":mode, "isActive":isActive, "Code":bomId }
			curDesc = {
				"firstName":firstName,
				"lastName":lastName,
				"userName":userName,
				"roleId":roleID,
				"eMail":email,
				"countryCode":countrycode,
				"phoneNumber":number,
				"password":password,
				"PasswordExpiry":passwordExpiry,
				"isActive":isActive
			}
			system.perspective.print(prevDesc)
			system.perspective.print(curDesc)
			description=str(auditMsg)+" Where ID="+str(Id)+" With Previous Data->"+str(prevDesc)+" and Updated Data->"+str(curDesc)
		else:
			description=str(auditMsg)
		createdBy=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddAuditLogs(category, subCategory, description, createdBy)
		#addAuditLogEnd
		
	except:
		message = "Something went wrong.Please contact System Adminstration"
		state = "error"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
		screenName ='userPanel'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/UserPanel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed  ->cntSave/btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		system.perspective.print("errorFunction: "+str(errorFunction)+" description: "+str(description)+" lineno: "+str(lineNumber))
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 	
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock("rightView")

# implement your handler here
	load=payload.copy()

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Check for password should be in proper format .
	"""
	try:
		import re
		password =self.props.text
		flag = 0
		if(self.props.text == " " or self.props.text == ' '):
			self.getSibling("lbl_passwordstrenght").props.text = ""
		while True:  
		    if (len(password)<8):
		        flag = -1
		        break
		    elif not re.search("[a-z]", password):
		        flag = -1
		        break
		    elif not re.search("[A-Z]", password):
		        flag = -1
		        break
		    elif not re.search("[0-9]", password):
		        flag = -1
		        break
		    elif not re.search("[_@$]", password):
		        flag = -1
		        break
		    elif re.search("\s", password):
		        flag = -1
		        break
		    else:
		        flag = 0
		        self.getSibling("lbl_passwordstrenght").props.text = ""
		        self.custom.passwordStrenght=1
		        #system.perspective.print("strong")
		        break
		  
		if flag ==-1 :
			if (len(password)!=0):
				self.getSibling("lbl_passwordstrenght").props.text="Password Strength - Weak"
				self.custom.passwordStrenght=-1
			else:
				self.getSibling("lbl_passwordstrenght").props.text = ""
	except:
		screenName ='userPanel'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/UserPanel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onKeyUp  ->cntPassword/txt')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		system.perspective.print("errorFunction: "+str(errorFunction)+" description: "+str(description)+" lineno: "+str(lineNumber))
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

tooltip.text: Password must contain one uppercase letter, one special character

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: password and retype password check
	"""
	try:
		password = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntPassword").getChild("txt").props.text
		password = password.strip()
		repassword = self.props.text
		repassword = repassword.strip()
		if repassword != password :
			self.getSibling("lbl_passwordmatch").props.text = "Password doesn't match"
		else:
			self.getSibling("lbl_passwordmatch").props.text = ""
	except:
		screenName ='userPanel'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/UserPanel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onKeyUp  ->cntRePassword/txt')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		system.perspective.print("errorFunction: "+str(errorFunction)+" description: "+str(description)+" lineno: "+str(lineNumber))
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

# implement your handler here
	system.util.getLogger("update").info(str(payload["dt"]))
	self.props.value = payload["dt"]

onChange.script:
"""
			Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
			Written Date: 04/09/2024
			Purpose: Check Special character in text. 
	"""
	import re
	 
	def contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    # Define a regex pattern for special characters
	    pattern = r'[^a-zA-Z0-9:]'
	    
	    # Search for special characters
	    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
	        return True
	    else:
	        return False
	input_string = self.props.text
	if contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]

"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 09/01/2025
		Purpose: Only string and numbers check for SR number .
	"""
	import re
	text = self.props.text
	if len(text) <= 15:
		self.props.text = self.props.text
	
	# Define a function to check if the text starts with "SR" followed by integers
		def contains_special_characters(input_string):
		    # Define a regex pattern for special characters
		    pattern = r'[^(?i)SR\d+$]'
		    
		    # Search for special characters
		    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
		        return True
		    else:
		        return False
		input_string = self.props.text
		if contains_special_characters(input_string):
		    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]
	else:
		self.props.text = ''

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Passing value to Add/Edit panel.
		"""
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text = payload['headerLabel']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntFirstName").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['firstName']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLastName").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['lastName']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntUserName").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['userName']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntEMail").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['eMail']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntPhone").getChild("txtCountryCode").props.text=payload['countryCode']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntPhone").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['phoneNumber']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntRoles").getChild("drpRole").props.value = payload['roleId']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value = payload['isActive']
#		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntPassword").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['password']
#		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntRePassword").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['password']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntSave").getChild("btn_Save").props.text = payload["Action"]
		if payload['headerLabel'] == 'Add':
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntExpiry").getChild("drpExpiry").props.value= payload['PasswordExpiry']
		else:
			PasswordExpiry = payload['PasswordExpiry']
			system.perspective.print("PasswordExpiry")
			system.perspective.print(PasswordExpiry)
#			import datetime 
#			format = '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'
#			dt = datetime.datetime.strptime(PasswordExpiry, format) 
			#parsing datetime in Password Expiry
			year = int(PasswordExpiry.split(" ")[0].split("-")[0])
			month = int(PasswordExpiry.split(" ")[0].split("-")[1])
			date = int(PasswordExpiry.split(" ")[0].split("-")[2])
			newDate = system.date.getDate(year, (month - 1), date)
			system.perspective.print(newDate)
			hours = int(PasswordExpiry.split(" ")[1].split(":")[0])
			mins = int(PasswordExpiry.split(" ")[1].split(":")[1])
			
			Datetime = system.date.setTime(newDate, hours, mins, 0)
			system.perspective.print("Datetime")
			system.perspective.print(Datetime)
			if PasswordExpiry.split('-')[0] == '9999':
				PasswordExpiry = "Never"
			else:
				PasswordExpiry = "Custom"
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntExpiry").getChild("drpExpiry").props.value = PasswordExpiry
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntExpiryDate").getChild("ToDateTimeInput").props.value = Datetime
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntSave").getChild("btn_Save").props.text = payload["Action"]
	except:
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='userPanel'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/User')  
		errorFunction = str('root ->messageHandler->userPanel')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
